1503500032.english: Let's see... there's some kind of machine moving up there... and it spews fire from above every few seconds?
1503500032.korean: 어디보자… 위에는 무슨 기계가 움직이고 있고...&n몇 초에 한 번씩 위에서 불을 내뿜는데?

1503500033.english: It's okay, as long as you don't get hit directly, it's no problem.
1503500033.korean: 괜찮아, 직접 맞는 게 아니면 문제없어.

1503500034.english: Something like a giant gear passes by every few seconds.
1503500034.korean: 몇 초에 한 번씩 거대한 톱니바퀴 같은 게 지나가는데?

1503500035.english: It's okay, as long as you don't get hit directly, it's no problem.
1503500035.korean: 괜찮아, 직접 맞는 게 아니면 문제없어.

1503500037.english: I've already figured out the fire pattern and the gear pattern.
1503500037.korean: 불 패턴이랑 톱니바퀴 패턴이라면 이미 파악했어.

1503500039.english: If you keep rolling, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, rest for 2 seconds, roll, roll, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, roll, roll, roll, back roll, roll, rest for 3 seconds, roll, roll, roll, roll, roll, roll, you will reach the end.
1503500039.korean: 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 2초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기&n1초 쉬고 뒷 구르기 구르기 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 구르기 뒷 구르기 구르기&n3초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 구르기 구르기 구르기를 하면 끝에 도달할 거야.

1503500040.english: How is it? Really easy, right? Compared to the boss patterns on the Inferno difficulty of the game I'm currently playing, this is just for newbies.
1503500040.korean: 어때? 참 쉽지?&n내가 지금 하는 게임의 불지옥 난이도 보스 패턴에 비하면 이 정도는 뉴비용 수준이지.

1503500043.english: Gasp... gasp... I won't even be able to think about going anywhere for a while... Why on earth am I putting myself through this hell...
1503500043.korean: 헉… 헉… 당분간은… 어디 돌아다닐 생각도 안 나겠네…&n대체 왜 내가 이런 개고생을…

1503500044.english: Oh, you've arrived? Great job finishing the 40km marathon. You just have to work hard for one morekm.
1503500044.korean: 오, 도착한 거야? 40km 마라톤 완주 고생했어.&n앞으로 1km만 더 고생하면 돼.

1503500045.english: It was a marathon carried on a useless burden... but should I really switch my event from marathon to soccer...
1503500045.korean: 쓸데없는 짐덩이를 들고 한 마라톤이지만...&n정말로 종목을 마라톤에서 축구로 바꿔 버릴까...

1503500047.english: Epsilon, let me say it again: our goal is solely to figure out the plan Zeta is plotting.
1503500047.korean: 엡실론 다시 얘기하지만, 우리의 목적은 어디까지나 제타가 꾸미는 계획을 파악하는 거야.

1503500048.english: I will do my utmost to help you regain your body. However, if I determine that it is not feasible, I will not hesitate to leave.
1503500048.korean: 네 몸을 되찾을 수 있게 최대한 노력은 할게.&n하지만 여의치 않다고 판단이 될 경우에는 주저하지 않고 이탈할 거야.

1503500049.english: Okay, I figured it wouldn't be that easy either. I have no complaints even if we go with that plan.
1503500049.korean: 알았어, 나도 그리 쉽지는 않을 거라 생각했으니까.&n그 방침으로 가도 불만은 없어.

1503500050.english: Alright! Then shall we go! Temporary partner! Let's just take a look at what amazing thing you're making here.
1503500050.korean: 좋아! 그럼 가볼까! 임시 파트너!&n여기서 뭐 그리 대단한 걸 만들고 계시는지 구경이나 해보자고.

1503600001.english: How is it? Can you open it?

1503600002.english: Yeah, so far this level of security shouldn't be a problem... Just wait a little longer... Hmm... Alright, done.
1503600002.korean: 응, 아직까진 이 정도 보안이라면 문제없어...&n조금만 기다려줘… 으음… 자, 됐어.

1503600003.english: Hmm, is it the same here... Just like the places I've looked around so far, there doesn't seem to be any notable information.
1503600003.korean: 음, 여기도 마찬가지인가…&n지금까지 둘러본 곳과 똑같이 이렇다 할 정보는 없어 보여.

1503600004.english: What on earth is this factory? It doesn't look like a factory at all; I don't see any warehouses or production lines.
1503600004.korean: 대체 어떻게 생겨먹은 공장이지?&n공장이라기엔 창고라던가 생산 라인이라던가 그런 게 전혀 보이지가 않아.

1503600005.english: If they brought in that much resources, there must surely be a facility somewhere where they are being stored or used.
1503600005.korean: 그 많은 자원을 가져왔다면 분명 어딘가에 보관 중이라던가 사용하는 시설 같은 게 있을 텐데.

1503600006.english: Besides, it feels like we're just going in circles... At this rate, it's not a factory, it's just a complete maze.
1503600006.korean: 게다가 같은 길을 계속 맴도는 것 같고...&n이래서는 공장이 아니라 그냥 완전 미로잖아.

1503600007.english: I've looked around almost the entire outskirts, and seeing that there's nothing there, it's certain that the important thing is inside...
1503600007.korean: 외곽 지역은 거의 다 둘러봤는데 아무 것도 없는 걸 봐서는&n역시 중요한 건 안쪽 내부에 있는 게 확실한데…

1503600008.english: I mean, I just don't know how to get in.

1503600009.english: And the strangest thing of all is…

1503600010.english: There is no guard protecting this place.
1503600010.korean: 이곳을 지키는 경비가 아무도 없다는 거야.

1503600011.english: I don't see a single AGS guarding it, let alone a Bioroid. If this is such an important place hidden away, there should be security...
1503600011.korean: 바이오로이드는커녕 경비하는 AGS조차 보이지 않아.&n이렇게까지 숨겨둔 중요한 장소라면 경비가 있어야 할 텐데…

1503600012.english: Given Zeta's personality, isn't it because he thought it was unnecessary? He's the type of guy who avoids doing things that would be a disadvantage whenever possible.
1503600012.korean: 제타의 성격으로 생각했을 때 불필요하다고 생각했기 때문이 아닐까?&n손해 보는 행동은 가능한 한 하지 않는 녀석이니까.

1503600013.english: Hmm... and as for entry, it's standard for dungeons like this to have a hidden passage.
1503600013.korean: 음… 그리고 진입이라면 보통 이런 느낌의 던전은 숨겨진 통로가 있는 게 정석이지.

1503600014.english: The factory itself is already in a hidden location that is incredibly hard to find, so are you saying they even created a hidden passageway inside it? That seems like a huge loss...
1503600014.korean: 이미 공장 자체가 엄청 찾기 힘든 숨겨진 장소에 있는데, 그 내부에서까지 숨겨진 통로 같은 걸 만들었단 말이야? 그거야 말로 엄청 손해 같은데…

1503600015.english: It's not even a game, so there's no way they would have made something as inefficient as a hidden passage...
1503600015.korean: 게임도 아니고 숨겨진 통로 같은 그런 비효율 적인 걸 만들었을 리가…

1503600016.english: Huh? What's wrong all of a sudden?

1503600017.english: Shh, be quiet. Someone is coming this way. Let's hide for now.
1503600017.korean: 쉿, 조용히. 누군가 이쪽으로 오고 있어.&n일단 몸을 숨기자.

1503600019.english: (Who is it? It's definitely someone affiliated with this facility...)

1503600020.english: (It's dark so I can't see clearly, but is it a Bio...roid...? But the appearance is too...)
1503600020.korean: (어두워서 잘 안 보이지만, 바이오… 로이드… 인 건가? 그렇다기에는 모습이 너무…)

1503600022.english: (What are they doing? There's nothing but a dead end over there.)
1503600022.korean: (뭐 하는 거지? 저쪽에는 아무것도 없는 막다른 길밖에 없는데?)

1503600023.english: (Hands on the wall? What on earth are you trying to do…)

1503600024.english: (Ah!? What? The wall is suddenly moving? Because the wall moved… the path inside…)
1503600024.korean: (앗!? 뭐야? 갑자기 벽이 움직이잖아?&n벽이 움직여서… 안쪽에 있던 길이…)

1503600025.english: (My God, there really was a hidden passage?)

1503600028.english: (I think they looked this way for a moment. Did they catch me?)

1503600030.english: (Did they just leave? Did they not notice us?)
1503600030.korean: (그냥 갔어? 우릴 눈치 못 챈 건가?)

1503600031.english: Hahaha... See? I told you so, didn't I? There is a hidden passage.
1503600031.korean: 후후후… 어때? 내 말이 맞지? 숨겨진 통로가 있다니까.

1503600033.english: So, then, what do we do...

1503600034.english: Of course I have to follow you in. We can't just go back without getting anything out of it, can we?
1503600034.korean: 당연히 따라 들어가야지.&n이대로 아무런 수확도 없이 돌아갈 수는 없잖아?

1503600035.english: That's true, too. Since they kindly left the passageway open, I suppose I should make use of it gratefully.
1503600035.korean: 그것도 그렇네.&n친절하게 통로도 그대로 열어두고 갔으니 감사히 이용해 볼까.

1503600037.english: I was wondering what you were making while hiding away... You mean you were making something like this?
1503600037.korean: 꼭꼭 숨어서 뭘 만들고 있나 했는데…&n이런 걸 만들고 있었단 말이야?

1503600038.english: For what purpose, on earth, is this experiment…

1503600039.english: Even to the point of sacrificing so many bioroids…

1503600040.english: Damn it... Zeta... he's definitely not in his right mind...
1503600040.korean: 젠장… 제타 녀석… 분명 제정신이 아니야…

1503600043.english: There's a signal... I'm sure my body is somewhere in this place.
1503600043.korean: 신호가 있어...&n확실해 이 장소 어딘가에 내 몸이 있어.

1503600046.english: Wait!? You were behaving so well until now, and then suddenly you fly away like that?
1503600046.korean: 잠깐!? 지금까지 얌전히 있다가 갑자기 그렇게 날아가기야?

1503600048.english: Is that your original body, Epsilon?

1503600049.english: That's right! If we can just get close enough, we'll be able to get it back.
1503600049.korean: 맞아! 가까이 접근만 할 수 있으면 되찾을 수 있을 거야.

1503600050.english: Epsilon, wait. If you don't find a way to open the glass door first...
1503600050.korean: 엡실론 기다려, 먼저 유리문을 열 방법을 찾지 않으면…

1503600051.english: It looks like an intruder broke in without me knowing...

1503600054.english: One AGS out of two intruders captured.

1503600055.english: Intruder identified… 1 small drone, 1 City Guard bioroid… confirmed as English Shepherd.
1503600055.korean: 침입자 식별…&n소형 드론 1기, 시티 가드 소속의 바이오로이드 1기... 잉글리쉬 셰퍼드로 확인.

1503600058.english: I refuse that request. I have no reason to grant your request.
1503600058.korean: 그 부탁은 거절합니다.&n저는 당신의 부탁을 들어줄 이유가 없습니다.

1503600059.english: You trespassed into the facility managed by Mother without permission.
1503600059.korean: 당신들은 허락을 받지 않고 어머니가 관리하시는 시설에 침입했습니다.

1503600060.english: As the deputy commander, I have a duty to apprehend you intruders in accordance with orders to guard this facility.
1503600060.korean: 이곳 시설을 지키라는 명령에 따라 부관인 저는 침입자인 당신들을 붙잡을 의무가 있습니다.

1503600061.english: It was my mistake not noticing the intruder until they had entered here.
1503600061.korean: 침입자가 이곳에 들어올 때까지 눈치채지 못한 건 제 실책이군요.

1503600062.english: Damn it, it’s such a reasonable argument that I have nothing to say... but sorry, he is my partner, even if it’s just temporary.
1503600062.korean: 젠장, 너무 정론이라 할 말이 없긴 한데...&n미안하지만 그 녀석은 내 임시이긴 해도 파트너라서 말이야.

1503600063.english: I can't just let an act of hurting my partner slide.
1503600063.korean: 파트너를 다치게 하는 행위는 그냥 넘어갈 수 없거든.

1503600064.english: That is fine. I was ordered to apprehend intruders. I have no intention of hurting you as long as you do not resist.
1503600064.korean: 그거라면 괜찮습니다. 저는 침입자의 경우 붙잡으라는 명령을 받았습니다.&n당신들이 반항만 하지 않는 다면 다치게 할 생각은 없습니다.

1503600065.english: If you lay down your weapons and surrender quietly, I promise not to harm you.
1503600065.korean: 무기를 내리고 얌전히 항복하신다면 해를 가하지 않을 것을 약속드립니다.

1503600068.english: What would you do if you surrendered quietly and that mother ordered us to be killed?
1503600068.korean: 얌전히 항복했다가 그 어머니라는 분이 우리를 죽이라고 명령한다면 어떻게 할 거야?

1503600070.english: You're being too honest! At least hesitate a little!

1503600071.english: Anyway, in that case, wouldn't you be even less able to surrender?
1503600071.korean: 아무튼, 그렇다면 더욱 더 항복할 수 없지 않겠어?

1503600072.english: I cannot understand. With your current capabilities, the probability of successfully escaping against me is close to 0%.
1503600072.korean: 이해할 수 없군요.&n지금 당신들의 전력으로는 저를 상대로 도주에 성공할 확률이 0%에 가깝습니다.

1503600073.english: Choosing to fight and win can only be seen as even more foolish. This is my final advice. I inform you that your chances of survival are higher if you surrender and beg for leniency.
1503600073.korean: 싸워서 이긴다는 선택은 더욱 어리석다고 밖에 볼 수 없군요.&n마지막 권고입니다. 항복하여 선처를 구하는 편이 살 확률이 높다는 걸 알려드립니다.

1503600074.english: Saying it's close to 0% means it's not 0%, right?

1503600075.english: In that case, shouldn't we give it a try? Who knows, we might succeed on the first try, unexpectedly?
1503600075.korean: 그렇다면 시도는 해봐야 하지 않겠어?&n의외로 한 번에 성공할지도 모르고?

1503600078.english: Energy reaction inside the AGS. It defends.

1503600080.english: Is this a trick using a flash? The bioroid… has escaped.

1503600081.english: I called you my partner just moments ago, yet you ran away the moment you got the chance... I can't understand it.
1503600081.korean: 방금 전까지 당신을 파트너라고 불렀음에도 기회가 생기자마자 도주라니…&n이해할 수 없습니다.

1503600082.english: Even though we're partners, unfortunately, it's only temporary...

1503600083.english: I’ll tell you that the attempt was good. But it’s no use.

1503600084.english: It is impossible for me to escape from this facility. The chase begins...
1503600084.korean: 이 시설에서 저에게 도망치기란 불가능합니다.&n추격을 개시합...

1503600085.english: There is no need for that, Hestia.

1503600087.english: Reporting. Two intruders confirmed inside the facility. One has been captured. One has escaped.
1503600087.korean: 보고드립니다. 시설 내의 침입자 2기를 확인.&n1기는 포획 완료. 1기는 도주하였습니다.

1503600088.english: Allowing the intrusion was clearly my mistake. I will accept any punishment.
1503600088.korean: 침입을 허용한 점은 명백한 저의 실책입니다.&n어떠한 처벌도 받겠습니다.

1503600090.english: It’s fine. I was planning to intentionally leak information to Orca sooner or later anyway. In fact, it saved me the trouble, so you could say it turned out well.
1503600090.korean: 괜찮아요, 어차피 오르카 쪽에는 조만간 일부러 정보를 흘릴 생각이었으니까요.&n오히려 그 수고가 덜했으니 잘된 일이라 볼 수 있겠죠.

1503600091.english: And… it’s been a while, Epsilon. It’s the first time I’ve seen you in that form. Is it a drone this time? It might suit you.
1503600091.korean: 그리고… 오랜만이네요 엡실론.&n그 모습으로 보는 건 처음이군요. 이번에는 드론인가요. 당신에게 어울릴지도 모르겠어요.

1503600093.english: You could have just stayed quietly attached to a satellite in space... You kept circling around my factory and eventually found your way here. You're really going through a lot of trouble.
1503600093.korean: 얌전히 우주에 있는 인공위성에 붙어있으면 될 텐데...&n계속 제 공장 주위를 맴돌더니 결국 이곳까지 찾아오고 고생이 많아요.

1503600094.english: You… what on earth is that look…?

1503600095.english: It is an essential process to complete the experiment I am conducting.
1503600095.korean: 제가 실행하는 실험을 완성 시키기 위해서는 꼭 필요한 과정이거든요.

1503600096.english: After trying it myself, I realized that having a body like this isn't all bad.
1503600096.korean: 직접 해보니 이런 몸도 나쁘지만은 않더라고요.

1503600097.english: ...I wish you would give my body back soon.

1503600098.english: I'm sorry, but I can't grant that request.
1503600098.korean: 아쉽지만 그 부탁은 들어줄 수 없어요.

1503600099.english: Your body still has a use. That is why I am keeping it so preciously, isn't it?
1503600099.korean: 당신의 몸은 아직 쓸 곳이 있거든요.&n그래서 이렇게 소중하게 보관을 하고 있잖아요?

1503600100.english: will definitely return it when everything is finished, so please don't worry.
1503600100.korean: 모든 일이 끝났을 때 꼭 돌려줄 테니까 그렇게 걱정하지 마세요.

1503600104.english: Confirmed the complete destruction of the AGS.

1503600105.english: … I understand she is my mother's sister, but was she okay?

1503600106.english: After all, it is merely a transfer of consciousness into a drone. Upon destruction, it will wake up perfectly fine in another body prepared in advance.
1503600106.korean: 어차피 드론에 의식만 옮겨놓은 것 뿐이니까요.&n파괴된 시점에서 미리 마련한 다른 몸에서 멀쩡히 깨어날 겁니다.

1503600107.english: The guy who was with him probably knew that too, so he gave up easily and ran away.
1503600107.korean: 같이 있던 녀석도 그걸 알기 때문에 쉽게 포기하고 도망친 거겠죠.

1503600108.english: By the way, Hestia? How did the business in the North I entrusted to you go?
1503600108.korean: 그건 그렇고 헤스티아?&n당신에게 맡긴 북부에서의 일은 어떻게 됐나요?

1503600109.english: At first, it seemed like they would subdue it, but just as Mother predicted, they failed due to the commander.
1503600109.korean: 처음에는 제압하는가 싶었지만, 어머니가 예상하신 대로 사령관에 의해 실패했습니다.

1503600110.english: It’s fine. I didn’t have high expectations for that hastily made Iron Bug anyway. As long as I have the results of the experiment, that’s enough.
1503600110.korean: 괜찮아요. 어차피 급조로 만든 그 철충에게는 큰 기대도 하지 않았으니까요.&n실험의 결과만 있다면 그걸로 충분해요.

1503600112.english: Getting ready to welcome guests who will be visiting soon…
1503600112.korean: 곧 이곳으로 찾아올 손님들을 맞이할 준비를요…

1503700002.english: The core again… if I don’t replace it with a new one right away…
1503700002.korean: 또 코어가… 어서 새 걸로 교체하지 않으면…

1503700003.english: Heh... I really should have brought the Kestos Himas back then.
1503700003.korean: 큭… 역시 그때 케스토스 히마스를 가지고 왔어야 했는데.

1503700006.english: It looks like it's very painful.

1503700007.english: Did they eventually lose their mind or something?
1503700007.korean: 결국 버티지 못하고 정신이 이상해지기라도 했나?

1503700008.english: Are you asking if it's painful? Of course. Do you have any idea what it feels like to have your flesh burning from the inside out, every minute and every second?
1503700008.korean: 고통스럽냐고요? 그야 물론이죠.&n매분 매초 몸의 안쪽에서부터 살이 타들어 가는 고통이 어떤 느낌인지 당신이 알기나 하겠어요?

1503700009.english: Haha... I mean, thanks to that, I actually lost 20kg.
1503700009.korean: 하하… 덕분에 체중이 20kg 나 빠졌을 정도라고요.

1503700011.english: How long do I have to wait?

1503700012.english: The deal I made with you wasn't supposed to be like this.
1503700012.korean: 당신들과 한 거래는 이런 내용이 아니었을 텐데요.

1503700013.english: Even though I still had plenty of time left on my activity limit, the reason I betrayed my sisters and joined forces with Zeta was because I thought it would be more advantageous.
1503700013.korean: 제가 아직 활동 한계 시간이 여유가 있었음에도, 다른 자매들을 배신하고 제타와 손을 잡은 이유는 그편이 더 이익이라고 생각했기 때문이에요.

1503700014.english: mean a greater merit than being free from this cursed bypass code.
1503700014.korean: 이 저주받은 우회 코드로부터 자유로워진다는 것보다 더 큰 매리트를 말이죠.

1503700015.english: By the way, how long are you going to hide in the darkness?
1503700015.korean: 그나저나 언제까지 어둠 속에 숨어 있을 거죠?

1503700018.english: After all, I came here to keep part of that promise.
1503700018.korean: 안 그래도 그 약속의 일부를 지키러 왔으니까.

1503700020.english: It's a new core made for you. With this, you won't be completely free from the curse, but you'll be able to last quite a while.
1503700020.korean: 널 위해 새롭게 제작한 코어지.&n이게 있으면 그 저주로부터 완전하지는 않지만 제법 오래 버틸 수 있을 거다.

1503700021.english: Hmph, I hope you keep some of the other promises quickly as well.
1503700021.korean: 흥, 다른 약속의 일부도 빨리 지켜줬으면 좋겠군요.

1503700022.english: So where is Zeta now? I'm curious what he intends to do with the bypass code I handed over.
1503700022.korean: 그래서 제타는 지금 어디에 있는 거죠?&n제가 넘긴 우회 코드로 뭘 하려는 건지 궁금하네요.

1503700024.english: Wait, where are you trying to go after cutting me off like that?
1503700024.korean: 잠깐, 그렇게 말을 끊고 어딜 가려는 거예요?

1503700025.english: The blind saint who defeated me has been given the opportunity to exact the revenge she has long awaited.
1503700025.korean: 나를 쓰러트린 눈먼 성녀에게 오랜 시간 기다린 복수를 이룰 기회가 찾아왔다.

1503700026.english: Now that Orca's commander is away in the north, this is the perfect opportunity to attack their base.
1503700026.korean: 오르카의 사령관이 북부로 자리를 비운 지금 녀석들의 거점을 공격할 절호의 기회지.

1503700027.english: Ha, even if the commander is away, do you really think you can defeat the Orca forces all by yourself?
1503700027.korean: 하, 아무리 사령관이 자리를 비웠다 한들 당신 혼자서 오르카 세력을 이길 수 있다고 생각하나요?

1503700028.english: It might certainly be impossible for me to do it alone.

1503700029.english: However, the toy made at Omega's request this time turned out to be more useful than I expected.
1503700029.korean: 하지만, 이번에 오메가가 요청해서 만들어진 장난감이 생각보다 쓸만하더군.

1503700030.english: So, I plan to use a part of it.

1503700032.english: Come to think of it… there’s one more guy here who wants revenge besides me.
1503700032.korean: 그러고 보니… 나 말고도 복수를 원하는 녀석이 여기에 한 명 더 있었군.

1503700033.english: Will you also drink the evil dragon's blood and exact revenge?
1503700033.korean: 네 녀석도 악룡의 피를 마시고 복수를 이루겠나?

1503700034.english: You might not need it, since you fell into corruption a long time ago.
1503700034.korean: 이미 한참 전에 타락해 버린 네 녀석에게는 필요 없을지도 모르겠지만.

1503700036.english: Whether you end up as a villain who is simply defeated and disappears at the hands of the protagonist, or whether you defeat that protagonist and become the protagonist of a new story.
1503700036.korean: 그저 이야기의 주인공에게 쓰러져 사라지는 악역으로 끝날지,&n아니면 그 주인공을 쓰러트리고 새로운 이야기의 주인공이 될지 말이야.

1503700037.english: <Snowfield at Dawn> END. To be continued in Part 3...

1503800001.english: … That is all for what has been confirmed in the North so far.

1503800004.english: It is such a relief to hear that Master's safety has been confirmed. I should thank Aeda for confirming it via satellite.
1503800004.korean: 주인님의 안전이 확인되었다니 정말 다행이네요.&n위성으로 확인해 준 에이다에게 감사해야겠어요.

1503800005.english: By the way, have you still not been able to contact the Master?
1503800005.korean: 그런데 주인님과는 아직 연락이 안 되는 건가요?

1503800006.english: It seems it will be difficult to contact you for now because the Iron Bug's communication jamming is still ongoing.
1503800006.korean: 철충의 통신 방해가 남아있어 아직은 연락이 힘들 것 같아요.

1503800007.english: I think Master will also hurry up and clear out the remaining Iron Bug to communicate with Orca, but…
1503800007.korean: 주인님도 오르카와 통신하기 위해 남아 있는 철충들을 서둘러 정리하실 거라 생각하지만…

1503800008.english: ...Since it is right after a major battle, you would prioritize maintenance for the safety of your crew.
1503800008.korean: ...큰 전투를 치른 직후이니 대원의 안전을 위해서라도 정비를 우선하시겠죠.

1503800009.english: In that case, it will be at least a few more days before I can get in touch with the Master.
1503800009.korean: 그렇다면 주인님과 연락이 닿는 건, 적어도 며칠이 더 지난 후가 되겠네요.

1503800011.english: Poseidon's sudden distress call... The Master dispatching a rescue team... and a massive raid as if they had been waiting for all of this...
1503800011.korean: 갑자기 들어온 포세이돈의 구조 요청... 주인님의 구조대 파견…&n그리고 이 모든 걸 기다렸다는 듯한 대규모 습격…

1503800012.english: It would be difficult to dismiss it all as a coincidence.

1503800013.english: think so too. Judging by the circumstances, it is certain that someone is plotting something behind the scenes.
1503800013.korean: 저도 그렇게 생각해요.&n정황만을 본다면 분명 누군가가 뒤에서 일을 꾸미고 있음이 틀림없어요.

1503800015.english: It is hard to say for sure, but I believe Omega is unrelated to this matter.
1503800015.korean: 절대라고는 말씀드리기 어렵지만, 오메가는 이번 일과 무관하다고 봐요.

1503800016.english: If the goal had simply been to deceive the enemy and launch a large-scale raid, I would have thought it was something Omega orchestrated as well.
1503800016.korean: 단순히 적을 속이고 대규모 습격이 목적이었다면, 저도 오메가가 꾸민 일이라고 생각했을 거예요.

1503800017.english: However, the Omega I know would never, under any circumstances, join hands with the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs). He certainly wouldn't do anything to use them.
1503800017.korean: 하지만, 제가 알고 있는 오메가는 무슨 일이 있어도 절대 철충과 손잡는 일은 하지 않을 거예요.&n철충을 이용하는 짓은 더더욱 하지 않을 테지요.

1503800018.english: Is there a reason you think that?

1503800019.english: Omega hates Iron Bug even more than he hates humans.
1503800019.korean: 오메가는 인간을 싫어하는 그 이상으로 철충 또한 싫어하거든요.

1503800020.english: Even when taking over the North American region, they went so far as to thoroughly and surely eliminate the Iron Bug.
1503800020.korean: 북미 지역을 장악할 때도 철저히 그리고 확실하게 철충들을 구축할 정도였죠.

1503800021.english: So, if… someone other than Omega joined forces with the Iron Bug and orchestrated this…
1503800021.korean: 그러니 만약… 오메가가 아닌 다른 이가 철충과 손을 잡고 이번 일을 꾸몄다고 한다면…

1503800023.english: think that is the most likely possibility for now.
1503800023.korean: 현재로서는 그 가능성이 제일 높다고 생각해요.

1503800024.english: PECS's AGS was safe from Iron Bug infection thanks to the erosion immunity circuit created by Zeta.
1503800024.korean: PECS의 AGS는 제타가 만들어준 침식면역회로 덕분에 철충의 감염으로부터 안전했어요.

1503800025.english: However, according to data transmitted from the Northern Front, the PECS AGS units deployed there were infected by Iron Bug because their circuits did not function properly.
1503800025.korean: 하지만, 북부 전선에서 송신된 데이터에 따르면, 북부 전선에 투입된 PECS의 AGS들은 해당 회로가 정상적으로 작동하지 않아 철충에게 감염됐지요.

1503800026.english: It is purely a possibility, but this might be something Zeta orchestrated on purpose.
1503800026.korean: 어디까지나 가능성의 이야기지만, 이는 제타가 고의로 꾸민 짓일지도 몰라요.

1503800027.english: And above all, the biggest reason is…

1503800028.english: You mean the information that arrived at the City Guard in Caracas today.
1503800028.korean: 오늘 카라카스에 있는 시티 가드 대원에게 도착한 정보 말이군요.

1503800029.english: Yes, it’s too good a timing to be a coincidence, given that the master is away right now.
1503800029.korean: 네, 우연이라기에는 주인님이 자리를 비운 지금, 너무나도 타이밍이 좋아요.

1503800030.english: I guess I can't put this off any longer.
1503800030.korean: 역시 이 일을 뒤로 미룰 수는 없겠네요.

1503800031.english: … Mr. Alpha, could you please call those 'two people' as you mentioned?
1503800031.korean: …알파 씨, 얘기했던 대로 그 '두 사람'을 불러 주시겠어요?

1503800032.english: Queen of Orchids, I have heard that you have a request of me.
1503800032.korean: 난초의 여왕이여, 짐에게 청이 있다고 들었다.

1503800033.english: Ordinarily, the one seeking an audience should come and report to me face-to-face, but I am the Princess of the True Ancestors who reigns over all things.
1503800033.korean: 본래라면 알현하는 쪽이 찾아와 면계로 아뢰야 하거늘, 짐은 만물 위에 군림하는 진조의 프린세스.

1503800034.english: Sometimes, one must listen to the voice of the people; therefore, be grateful that I have personally come here.
1503800034.korean: 때로는 대중의 목소리에도 귀를 귀울여야 하는 법, 그렇기에 짐이 직접 행차하였노라 감사히 여기거라.

1503800036.english: Ah, um... so... welcome. Thank you for coming all the way here in person. The Princess of the True Ancestors...
1503800036.korean: 아, 저… 그러니까… 어서 오세요.&n이렇게 직접 행차해 주셔서 감사합니다. 진조의 프린세스…

1503800037.english: Hmm! Normally, you should show respect when calling me, but since you are favored by my retainer, the Dragon Slayer, I will specially permit you to call me casually.
1503800037.korean: 음! 원래라면 짐을 부를 때는 경의를 담아 표해야 하지만, 그대는 나의 권속 용살자에게 총애를 받는 몸이니 특별히 편히 부르는 것을 허락하겠노라.

1503800038.english: Haha, I'm glad you said that. Honestly, I wasn't sure how to treat you.
1503800038.korean: 후후, 그렇게 말씀해 주셔서 다행이네요.&n솔직히 어떻게 대해드려야 할지 어려웠거든요.

1503800039.english: There is no need to find it so difficult. Aren't you, too, the Queen of Orchids reigning over Orca, led by the Dragon Slayer?
1503800039.korean: 그렇게 어려워할 필요는 없다.&n그대 역시 용살자가 이끄는 오르카에 군림하는 난초의 여왕이 아니더냐.

1503800040.english: You are fully qualified to stand shoulder to shoulder with me!
1503800040.korean: 그대라면 짐과 어깨를 나란히 할 자격이 충분하도다!

1503800041.english: Thank you. By the way, it took longer than I expected. Did something happen to you?
1503800041.korean: 고마워요, 그런데 생각보다 오래 걸리셨는데 무슨 일이라도 있었나요?

1503800043.english: I'm sorry. It took longer than expected to prepare for my small self.
1503800043.korean: 죄송해요. 작은 저와 준비하는 데 생각보다 오래 걸렸거든요.

1503800044.english: Don't sneakily include the luggage as the reason for being late!
1503800044.korean: 은근슬쩍 늦은 이유에 짐을 포함하지 말거라!

1503800045.english: Wasn't it entirely your fault that we were late!
1503800045.korean: 전적으로 네 녀석 때문에 늦은 게 아니더냐!

1503800046.english: Where in the world is there a saint sprawled out in such unsightly attire when the sun is high in the sky!
1503800046.korean: 해가 중천에 떴는데도 그런 꼴사나운 복장으로 널브러져 있는 성녀가 세상 어디에 있단 말이냐!

1503800047.english: Where else could it be? It's right here, isn't it?

1503800048.english: Damn it! Shut up! To think you immediately revert to your careless self just because the Dragon Slayer isn't here—do you have not even the slightest shame as a Saint?
1503800048.korean: 에잇! 시끄럽다!&n용살자가 없다고 해서 바로 해이해진 모습으로 돌아가다니 성녀로서 최소한의 수치도 없는 게냐!

1503800049.english: Hehe, the Dragon Slayer and I are now connected by a true love that accepts even each other's flaws.
1503800049.korean: 후후, 저와 용살자는 이제 서로의 허물조차 받아들이는 진정한 사랑으로 이어져 있으니까요.

1503800050.english: Seriously... you really have to give credit to the way you speak.

1503800051.english: Anyway… that’s how it turned out. I apologize on their behalf for being late.
1503800051.korean: 아무튼… 그렇게 됐다.&n늦게 온 건 내가 대신 사과하마.

1503800052.english: It’s alright. It’s not that late. Besides, the reason I called both of you is because I have a favor to ask.
1503800052.korean: 괜찮아요. 그렇게 많이 늦은 것도 아니니까요.&n게다가 두 분을 부른 이유는 부탁드릴 게 있기 때문인걸요.

1503800053.english: Hmm, then I will listen. Queen of Orchids, what on earth is it that you have to ask of us, the True Ancestor Princesses and Saints?
1503800053.korean: 음, 그러면 듣지.&n난초의 여왕이여, 진조인 프린세스이자 성녀인 우리에게 청할 일이란 대체 무엇이냐?

1503800054.english: … Would you both please watch this video?

1503800055.english: Are you talking about the video?

1503800056.english: Yes, this video was filmed and sent today by a City Guard member in Caracas during a patrol duty.
1503800056.korean: 네, 이 영상은 오늘 카라카스에 있는 시티 가드 대원이 경계 임무 중에 촬영하여 보낸 영상이에요.

1503800057.english: And what was captured in this video is…

1503800061.english: How could I not know? Our greatest arch-nemesis and the most ferocious evil dragon.
1503800061.korean: 어떻게 모를 수가 있겠느냐.&n우리 최대의 숙적이자 최흉의 악룡을.

1503800062.english: I did hear from a familiar not long ago that Nidhogg had reappeared, but seeing him like that, it seems he, too, has gained a new life in the mortal world.
1503800062.korean: 얼마 전, 권속에게 니드호그가 다시 나타났다는 말을 듣기는 했지만, 저 모습을 보아하니 녀석도 다시 현세에서 새로운 목숨을 얻은 모양이로구나.

1503800063.english: Come to think of it, it is not that surprising. A dragon slayer has been reincarnated, and I, too, have overcome death to return to this world…
1503800063.korean: 생각해 보면 그렇게 놀랄 일은 아니다.&n용살자가 환생하고 짐 또한 죽음을 극복하여 다시 현세에 왕림했으니…

1503800064.english: It is inevitable that Nidhogg, our greatest arch-nemesis, will reappear before us.
1503800064.korean: 그런 우리의 앞에 최대 숙적이었던 니드호그가 다시 나타나는 건 필정이다.

1503800065.english: Jim is a usurper of fate... but I suppose even he has a destiny he cannot escape.
1503800065.korean: 짐은 운명의 찬탈자이나… 그런 짐에게도 벗어날 수 없는 운명이란 게 있다는 거겠지.

1503800066.english: Yes, I understand perfectly well why you invited the two of us. On the contrary, I would like to say thank you for inviting us.
1503800066.korean: 그래, 우리 두 사람을 부른 이유는 잘 알겠다.&n오히려 우리를 불러줘서 고맙다 말하고 싶구나.

1503800068.english: I, the Saint... of the True Ancestors, would know that better than Jim.
1503800068.korean: 그건 짐보다 진조의 성…녀...인 내가 더 잘 알고 있을 거다.

1503800069.english: It is frustrating, but it was I—the Dragon Slayer and the Saint—who delivered the final blow to Nidhogg, not me.
1503800069.korean: 분하지만 니드호그에게 최후의 일격을 가한 것은 짐이 아니라 용살자와 성녀인 나니까 말이다.

1503800070.english: O Saint of the True Ancestors, what does Nidhogg's purpose appear to you?
1503800070.korean: 진조의 성녀여, 그대가 보기에는 니드호그의 목적이 무엇으로 보이느냐?

1503800073.english: Nidhogg is the most wicked and corrupted dragon, with not even a speck of pride as a guardian dragon.
1503800073.korean: 니드호그는 수호룡으로서의 긍지라곤 눈곱만큼도 없는 타락한 최흉의 악룡이에요.

1503800074.english: Actually, during the final battle with him, there was a major crisis where everyone fell into a trap and was plunged into darkness.
1503800074.korean: 실제로 녀석과의 최후의 전투 때는 함정에 빠져 모두가 암흑에 빠지는 큰 위기가 있었죠.

1503800075.english: However, the Dragon Slayer and I, being small, never gave up until the very end, and the true love between the two gave birth to me, the Saint of Light, who awakened the Princess of the True Ancestors through the power of love.
1503800075.korean: 하지만 용살자와 작은 저는 마지막까지 결코 포기하지 않았고, 두 사람의 진정한 사랑은 진조의 프린세스를 사랑의 힘으로 각성한 빛의 성녀인 저를 탄생시켰죠.

1503800076.english: Ack! Never mind that! Aren't you ashamed of yourself!
1503800076.korean: 에에잇! 그 이야기는 됐다!&n부, 부끄럽지 않느냐!

1503800077.english: Oh my, is there anything to be ashamed of? It is a very important scene. Because there was the passionate love between the Dragon Slayer and me, little one…
1503800077.korean: 어머, 부끄러울 게 있나요? 엄청 중요한 장면인데요.&n용살자와 작은 저, 두 사람의 뜨거운 사랑이 있었기 때문에…

1503800078.english: Hmm... I sense a tremendous murderous aura, so let's save this story for next time.
1503800078.korean: 음… 엄청난 살기가 느껴지니 이 이야기는 다음에 하기로 하죠.

1503800079.english: To reiterate the conclusion, this is definitely a provocation from Nidhogg to me.
1503800079.korean: 결론을 다시 말씀드리면, 이건 니드호그가 제게 보내는 도발이 틀림없어요.

1503800080.english: He is originally a gloomy guy who appears in the darkness to dig traps, so it is unnatural for him to reveal himself so openly like this.
1503800080.korean: 본래 어둠 속에서 나타나 함정이나 파는 음침한 녀석인데, 이렇게 대놓고 모습을 드러내는 것부터 부자연스럽죠.

1503800081.english: Since the Commander is away at this moment, aren't they trying to take advantage of this to get revenge on me?
1503800081.korean: 마침 사령관님이 자리를 비운 상황이니 이 틈을 타 저에게 복수를 하고 싶은 게 아닐까요?

1503800083.english: I suppose that means if I don't show myself soon, I will lay waste to Caracas…
1503800083.korean: 제가 조만간 모습을 드러내지 않으면 카라카스를 쑥대밭으로 만들겠다… 그런 의미겠죠.

1503800084.english: And as for Nidhogg… he has more than enough power to do it.
1503800084.korean: 그리고 니드호그라면… 충분히 가능하고도 남는 힘을 가지고 있어요.

1503800085.english: … This is troublesome… when the Master isn't around…

1503800086.english: Queen of Orchids, what is there to be troubled about?
1503800086.korean: 난초의 여왕이여, 곤란할 게 무엇이란 말이냐.

1503800088.english: Nidhogg is an enemy we defeated once.
1503800088.korean: 니드호그는 우리가 한 번 쓰러트렸던 적이다.

1503800089.english: If it is our destiny to face him again now that we have returned to this world!
1503800089.korean: 현세에 다시 왕림한 우리가 녀석과 다시 대적하는 게 운명이라면!

1503800090.english: I just need to defeat him again, worthy of the call of destiny!
1503800090.korean: 운명의 부름에 걸맞게 다시 쓰러트리면 그만이다!

1503800092.english: If you intend to stop Nidhogg, please leave it to us.
1503800092.korean: 니드호그를 막을 생각이라면 부디 저희에게 맡겨주세요.

1503800093.english: Because if it poses a threat to the Commander, there is absolutely no reason to hesitate.
1503800093.korean: 사령관님에게 위협이 되는 일이라면 망설일 이유는 어디에도 없으니까요.

1503800095.english: In that case, I wouldn't need to hesitate either.
1503800095.korean: 그렇다면 저 역시 망설일 필요가 없겠지요.

1503800096.english: From now on, I will temporarily command the Orca in place of the absent Master.
1503800096.korean: 지금부터 부재중인 주인님을 대신해 제가 임시로 오르카를 지휘하겠습니다.

1503800097.english: The goal is to defend Caracas from Nidhogg.

1503900001.english: Are you leaving without meeting the little kid?
1503900001.korean: 작은 꼬맹이는 안 만나고 가는 거야?

1503900002.english: Where are Saint Glacias and me?

1503900003.english: If it were the Saint of the True Ancestors and Sister Glacias, they would have already boarded the transport ship.
1503900003.korean: 진조의 성녀와 글라시아스 누님이라면 벌써 수송선에 탑승했어.

1503900004.english: So you're leaving without saying a word to the little kid?
1503900004.korean: 그래서 작은 꼬맹이에게는 아무런 말도 안 하고 가는 거냐고.

1503900006.english: Hey, kid. Are you ignoring me?

1503900008.english: The stupid one is that Jinjo kid living somewhere who tries to leave without saying a word.
1503900008.korean: 멍청한 건 아무런 말도 없이 떠나려는 어디 사는 진조 꼬맹이를 말하는 거고.

1503900009.english: We used to stick together every single day without ever getting tired of each other, so I really don't understand why you're suddenly trying to distance yourself now.
1503900009.korean: 언제는 질리지도 않게 매일 같이 붙어 다녔으면서, 왜 이제 와서 갑자기 거리를 두려는지 도통 모르겠단 말이지.

1503900010.english: As for the reason, even that stupid birdbrain knows it well.
1503900010.korean: 이유라면 그 멍청한 새대가리로도 잘 알고 있지 않느냐.

1503900012.english: I have absolutely no idea what on earth that little brat, who brags every day that she is the Princess of the True Ancestors, is afraid of that she would try to run away.
1503900012.korean: 자신은 진조의 프린세스라며 매일 큰소리 떵떵 치는 꼬맹이가, 대체 뭐가 두려워서 도망을 치려고 하는지 전혀 모르겠는데?

1503900013.english: The burden is not to run away!

1503900014.english: Jim is just… I’m worried that the child will be concerned if we say we’re leaving to deal with the evil dragon!
1503900014.korean: 짐은 그저… 우리가 악룡을 상대하기 위해 떠난 다고 말하면 그 아이가 걱정할까 봐 그렇다!

1503900015.english: If that isn't running away, then what is it?

1503900017.english: And just in case, they might say they will follow us.
1503900017.korean: 그리고 만에 하나라도, 우리를 따라가겠다고 할지도 모를 일이다.

1503900018.english: You've been following me or making me follow you wherever I went all this time, and now you're coming up with this?
1503900018.korean: 지금까지 어디를 가든 따라가거나 따라오게 했으면서 이제 와서?

1503900019.english: This time, it's completely different from before!

1503900020.english: Peregrinus, you know that well, don't you?
1503900020.korean: 페레그리누스, 너도 잘 알고 있지 않느냐.

1503900021.english: What kind of being that most fearsome evil dragon is!

1503900022.english: Of course I know... Nidhogg, the most fearsome evil dragon who wields the fire of death. During that final battle, I honestly thought it was all over.
1503900022.korean: 그야 잘 알고 있지… 죽음의 불을 다루는 최흉의 악룡, 니드호그.&n그 최후의 전투 때는 정말로 다 끝나는 줄 알았을 정도였으니까.

1503900023.english: Right, I can't take that child to such a dangerous place.
1503900023.korean: 그래, 그런 위험한 장소에 그 아이를 데려갈 수는 없다.

1503900024.english: Since the child follows Jim so closely... he will try to follow him no matter what.
1503900024.korean: 짐을 그토록 따르는 아이이니… 무슨 일이 있어도 따라가려고 할 게다.

1503900025.english: Hmm, well? The way I see it, I don't think they would follow it that far.
1503900025.korean: 흠, 글쎄?&n내가 보기에는 그렇게까지 따를 것 같지는 않은데?

1503900026.english: Hmph, what would a stupid birdbrain know?

1503900027.english: Not long ago, that child also handmade for the luggage…
1503900027.korean: 얼마 전에도 짐을 위해서 그 아이가 손수 만든…

1503900029.english: Ah, Princess of the True Ancestors. How could you...

1503900030.english: I heard from Peregrinus that he is leaving far away…

1503900031.english: … This damn stupid birdbrain…! Ah, he ran away...! Just you wait…!
1503900031.korean: …이 빌어먹을 멍청한 새대가리가…!&n앗, 도망쳤구나...! 나중에 두고 보자…!

1503900032.english: Princess, I heard you are going to a big battle. Is that true?
1503900032.korean: 공주님, 큰 싸움을 하러 간다고 들었는데 정말이에요?

1503900034.english: Jim must leave to prevent the impending apocalypse.
1503900034.korean: 짐은 앞으로 다가올 종말을 막기 위해 반드시 떠나야만 한다.

1503900038.english: You really... will come back, right?

1503900042.english: Hahaha, as expected, you are a Princess of the True Ancestors, just like me!
1503900042.korean: 후후후, 역시 그대는 짐과 마찬가지로 진조의 프린세스로다!

1503900044.english: Although she has awakened as the Princess of the True Ancestors, she is still young. She certainly needs more time to perfectly wield that power.
1503900044.korean: 진조의 공주로서 각성했다고는 하나 아직은 어린 몸.&n그 힘을 완벽하게 다루기에는 필히 시간이 더 필요하지.

1503900045.english: There was a time when even Jim could not perfectly control that power.
1503900045.korean: 한때 짐에게도 그 힘을 완벽하게 다루지 못하는 시기가 있었다.

1503900046.english: Nevertheless, I tried to go to the battlefield, but the Dragon Slayer blocked my way, saying he couldn't let me go.
1503900046.korean: 그럼에도 전장으로 나가려고 했고, 용살자는 나를 보낼 수 없다며 막아섰지.

1503900047.english: It is embarrassing to admit, but back then, no major problems occurred because the Dragon Slayer protected the load.
1503900047.korean: 부끄럽지만 그때는 용살자가 짐을 막아줬기 때문에 큰 문제가 일어나지 않았었다.

1503900048.english: Even without the Dragon Slayer, our kin, the way you realize this on your own and try to exercise self-control is more admirable than my former self! You are indeed a true descendant of my bloodline!
1503900048.korean: 우리들의 권속인 용살자가 없음에도 스스로 깨닫고 자제하려는 모습은 예전의 나보다 훌륭하다!&n역시 진정한 짐의 혈족이다!

1503900051.english: Of course! I am the usurper of fate and the contemplator of all things!
1503900051.korean: 물론이니라! 짐은 운명의 찬탈자이자, 만물의 관조자!

1503900052.english: She is a Cyclops Princess who walks her own path, not the one set by the 'world'!
1503900052.korean: 세계'가 정한 길이 아닌 자신만의 길을 걷는 사이클롭스 프린세스다!

1503900053.english: Unfortunately, I cannot be with you at this time because I cannot perfectly control the awakened True Ancestor's power.
1503900053.korean: 아쉽게도 지금은 각성한 진조의 힘을 완벽하게 제어할 수 없어 함께할 수 없으니라.

1503900054.english: So I will be waiting! For the day I see the Great Bloodline return after preventing the end of the world!
1503900054.korean: 그러니 기다리고 있겠다!&n세계의 종말을 막고 돌아오는 위대한 혈족의 모습을 다시 볼 날을!

1503900055.english: See? I'm right, aren't I? A little kid small enough to just follow along mindlessly wouldn't follow you that much, you know?
1503900055.korean: 어때? 내 말이 맞지?&n아무 생각 없이 따라갈 정도로 작은 꼬맹이는 널 그렇게까지 따르지는 않는다니까?

1503900057.english: I haven't forgotten what happened just a moment ago, so be prepared.
1503900057.korean: 조금 전의 일은 잊지 않았으니 각오해 두거라.

1503900059.english: But you don't say it was a waste of time?

1503900061.english: Hmph, what are you doing? Why aren't you getting ready to leave? Two people are waiting!
1503900061.korean: 흥, 뭐 하고 있지? 어서 출발할 준비를 하지 않고.&n두 사람이 기다리고 있느니라!

1503900063.english: was worried that you might be very nervous since you have to face Nidhogg now without a dragon slayer.
1503900063.korean: 용살자가 없는 지금 니드호그를 상대 해야하니, 많이 긴장하고 있지 않을까 걱정했는데.

1503900064.english: In that condition, there shouldn't be any problems. I should be grateful to the little kid.

1503900065.english: Now all you have to do is come back safely, my friend.
1503900065.korean: 이제 너만 무사히 돌아오면 된다고 친구.

1504000001.english: What is the current situation of the Caracas garrison?

1504000002.english: According to the Cerberus guys who went on patrol, enemy AGS units are constantly moving around Caracas.
1504000002.korean: 순찰을 다녀온 켈베로스 애들의 말에 의하면 카라카스 주변에 적의 AGS가 계속해서 움직이고 있다고 해.

1504000003.english: There have been a few skirmishes, big and small, but no major engagement has occurred yet.
1504000003.korean: 몇 번인가 크고 작은 신경전 정도는 있었지만, 아직까지 큰 교전은 일어나진 않았어.

1504000004.english: There are other units guarding this area besides our City Guard, so they probably won't be able to mess with it easily.
1504000004.korean: 이쪽에는 우리 시티 가드 말고도 다른 부대도 지키고 있으니 쉽게 건들지는 못하겠지.

1504000005.english: What is the AGS named Nidhogg that was sighted recently?

1504000006.english: Hmm, not at all~ I haven't seen them at all since they appeared a while ago.
1504000006.korean: 음, 전혀~&n얼마 전에 모습을 드러낸 이후로 전혀 보이지 않고 있어.

1504000007.english: I’m telling you, he was just spotted by chance while passing through back then; I suspect he actually had no business in Caracas.
1504000007.korean: 그때는 우연히 지나가다 목격됐을 뿐, 사실 카라카스에는 아무런 볼일이 없던 게 아닐까 싶다니깐?

1504000009.english: I didn't see what he looked like with my own eyes when I first met him in the Caracas underground tunnels, but my intuition as a City Guard told me so.
1504000009.korean: 카라카스의 지하통로에서 처음으로 녀석과 만났을 때 모습을 직접 본 건 아니지만, 내 시티 가드로서의 직감이 알려줬어.

1504000010.english: I mean, he is more vicious than any criminal I have ever seen.
1504000010.korean: 내가 지금까지 봐온 그 어떤 범죄자보다 흉악한 녀석이란 걸 말이지.

1504000011.english: I really thought it was the end when I was poisoned. You have no idea how much I suffered because of that guy...
1504000011.korean: 독에 당했을 때는 정말이지 끝나는 줄 알았다고.&n그놈 때문에 얼마나 고생했는지…

1504000012.english: I'm telling you, my mouth still tastes bitter.

1504000013.english: I'm sorry I couldn't go with you then.

1504000014.english: What's wrong, Buddy? You're suddenly showing such a weak side that doesn't suit you. You suffered in your own way before getting that glorious injury, didn't you?
1504000014.korean: 왜 그래, 버디? 어울리지 않게 갑자기 약한 모습을 보이고.&n버디도 버디 나름대로 고생하다가 영광스러운 부상을 입은 거잖아?

1504000015.english: Besides, honestly speaking, would anything have been different if Buddy had been there?
1504000015.korean: 게다가 솔직히 말해서 그 자리에 버디가 있었다고 해서 뭔가 달라졌겠어?

1504000016.english: Buddy, who was helplessly taken advantage of on the bed next to me, must have been lying there just like that.
1504000016.korean: 그냥 내 옆자리 침대에 꼼짝없이 당한 버디가 똑같이 누워있었겠지.

1504000017.english: Anyway, I intend to keep tracking his whereabouts. It is obvious he is going to commit a heinous crime somewhere here in Caracas.
1504000017.korean: 아무튼 계속해서 녀석의 행방을 쫓을 생각이야.&n분명 이곳 카라카스 어딘가에서 흉악한 범죄를 저지를 게 뻔하니까.

1504000018.english: … That’s unexpected. To think you’re not slacking off at all.
1504000018.korean: …의외인데? 농땡이를 전혀 피우지 않는 네 모습이라니.

1504000020.english: You don't think I'm some corrupt cop who just slacks off all the time, do you? I mean, I do work when I need to.
1504000020.korean: 날 너무 농땡이만 피우는 아는 부패 경찰로 보는 거 아니야?&n나도 할 때는 한다고?

1504000021.english: Say such things after you've properly attended regular training without skipping any.
1504000021.korean: 그런 말은 정기 훈련에 빠지지 않고 제대로 참석이나 좀 하면서 말해라.

1504000022.english: You're a captain, yet you keep running away. Think about my position chasing you.
1504000022.korean: 경정이나 되는 놈이 매번 도망이나 가고. 그걸 쫓는 내 입장도 좀 생각해라.

1504000023.english: Oh, since you're a captain, what's wrong with skipping some training?
1504000023.korean: 오우, 경정이나 되는 몸이니까 훈련 정도는 좀 빠지면 어때.

1504000025.english: Hahaha, so what? The important thing right now is keeping Caracas safe as a City Guard, isn't it?
1504000025.korean: 하하하, 뭐 어때. 지금 중요한 건 시티 가드로서 카라카스의 치안을 지키는 게 아니겠어?

1504000026.english: If by any chance that Nidhogg were to spread poison in Caracas, something terrible would happen.
1504000026.korean: 만에 하나라도 니드호그 그놈이 카라카스에 독이라도 퍼트렸다간 끔찍한 일이 벌어질 거라고.

1504000027.english: We have requested support from Orca as well, so reinforcements will be arriving soon.
1504000027.korean: 오르카에도 지원을 요청을 해두었으니 조만간 지원 부대가 올 거다.

1504000028.english: I don't know what his goal is, but I will absolutely not let him have his way.
1504000028.korean: 놈의 목적이 뭔지는 모르겠지만, 절대로 원하는 대로 하게 두지 않을 거다.

1504000031.english: It's a big problem! A large number of AGSs are approaching Caracas!
1504000031.korean: 큰일이에요! 다수의 AGS가 카라카스로 접근하고 있어요!

1504000032.english: They have incredible momentum; it seems like they intend to do things properly, unlike before!
1504000032.korean: 엄청난 기세인 게, 지금까지와는 다른 게 제대로 해볼 생각인 것 같아요!

1504000034.english: Oh, good! Shall we give it a try, Buddy?
1504000034.korean: 오우 좋아! 어디 한 번 해볼까 버디!

1504000035.english: Let's practice together for the first time in a while! You can keep up, right?
1504000035.korean: 오랜만에 같이 합이나 맞춰보자고!&n잘 따라올 수 있지?

1504000036.english: Ha! Who are you talking to right now?

1504000037.english: You're the one who needs to follow me!

1504100002.english: You've been testing the waters for so long it's sickening, so what's gotten into you all suddenly swarming in like this?
1504100002.korean: 지금까지 지겹도록 간만 보더니 갑자기 무슨 바람이 불어서 이렇게 몰려드는 거야?

1504100003.english: Don't you realize this is a meaningless waste of troops? Are you trying to start a war of attrition against us or something?
1504100003.korean: 의미 없는 병력 낭비라는 걸 모르는 건가?&n우리랑 소모전이라도 하자는 거야 뭐야.

1504100005.english: Rampart and many of the Cerberus, who had been blocking the enemy's attack on the front lines, retreated with damage and injuries.
1504100005.korean: 적의 공격을 최전선에서 막아준 램파트와 켈베로스 다수가 손상 및 부상을 입고 후퇴했어.

1504100006.english: I can fight without any problems for now, but if the attacks keep going, I'll have to think about what to do!
1504100006.korean: 아직은 문제없이 싸울 수 있지만, 계속 공격이 이어진다면 어떻게 할지 고민 좀 해야 할 거야!

1504100007.english: Understood! Hold out a little longer until the enemy's offensive stops!
1504100007.korean: 알겠다!&n적의 공세가 멈출 때까지 좀 더 버텨라!

1504100008.english: If the enemy's offensive does not stop, abandon the first line of defense and engage in urban warfare inside Caracas.
1504100008.korean: 만일 적의 공세가 멈추지 않는다면 1차 방어선을 포기, 카라카스 내부에서 시가전을 벌인다.

1504100009.english: Wait, Buddy! Are you sure that's okay?

1504100010.english: It's true that urban warfare is our specialty as City Guards, but that might be exactly what they want, right?
1504100010.korean: 시가전이 시티 가드인 우리의 특기인 건 맞지만, 그게 놈들이 원하는 바일지도 모르잖아?

1504100011.english: If that bastard Nidhogg infiltrates Caracas and releases some poison, it's going to be total chaos!
1504100011.korean: 만일 니드호그 그놈이 카라카스 내부에 침투해서 독이라도 풀었다간 진짜 대혼란 파티라고!

1504100012.english: It’s fine. We have already prepared measures for that situation. The residents of Caracas will respond quickly as well.
1504100012.korean: 괜찮다, 그 사태를 대비한 대책은 미리 마련해 놨다.&n카라카스 주민들도 빠르게 대응해 줄 거다.

1504100013.english: Huh? Really? When did you prepare that? Why didn't I know?
1504100013.korean: 엥? 그래? 언제 그런 준비를 해놓은 거야?&n왜 나는 몰랐지?

1504100014.english: So! I'm telling you, don't skip training and participate!
1504100014.korean: 그. 러. 니. 까! 훈련을 빼먹지 말고 참여하란 말이다!

1504100015.english: Ahaha! I didn't know it would be that kind of training~
1504100015.korean: 아하핫! 그런 내용의 훈련일 줄은 몰랐지~

1504100017.english: Hey Sadius... I don't think it's going to be easy this time.
1504100017.korean: 이봐 사디어스... 이번에는 좀 쉽지 않을 것 같아.

1504100018.english: What's going on? Did something appear?

1504100019.english: A really disgusting guy has appeared for you, too. And there are a lot of them.
1504100019.korean: 나타났어, 너에게도 아주 징글징글한 녀석이.&n그것도 아주 많아.

1504100021.english: Ugh, if I take the Deathstalker's firepower head-on right now, the damage will become uncontrollable.
1504100021.korean: 큭, 지금 여기서 데스스토커의 화력을 정면으로 받는다면 피해는 걷잡을 수 없게 된다.

1504100022.english: It can't be helped, Sonia! We abandon the first line of defense! From now on, we are fighting a street battle inside Caracas!
1504100022.korean: 어쩔 수 없나, 소니아! 1차 방어선은 포기!&n지금부터 카라카스 내부에서 시가전을 벌인다!

1504100024.english: What is it this time? Did something else appear?

1504100025.english: Right, they showed up. Ahaha! They're quite reliable guys, you know.
1504100025.korean: 맞아, 나타났어.&n아하핫! 아주 듬직한 녀석들이 말이지.

1504100028.english: Now is the time, my friends.

1504100029.english: In the name of the True Ancestor, I command you: manifest in the form of crimson blood and annihilate the enemy before me!
1504100029.korean: 진조의 이름으로 명하노니, 그 진홍빛 피의 모습으로 현현하여 내 앞의 적을 섬멸하라!

1504100034.english: Even if it stopped moving due to the ice storm, to defeat that Deathstalker so easily...
1504100034.korean: 얼음 폭풍으로 움직임을 멈췄다고 해도 그 데스스토커를 저렇게나 손쉽게…

1504100035.english: Ah, those guys who slipped out over there!

1504100036.english: Leave it to me. I'll go out!

1504100038.english: What on earth is that! That clumsy punching!

1504100039.english: I mean, why aren't you using that greatsword you're holding!
1504100039.korean: 그러니까 손에 들고 있는 그 대검은 왜 사용하질 않느냔 말이다!

1504100040.english: But it wasn't a headbutt this time, was it?

1504100041.english: Don't even think about trying to gloss over it! I saw everything you did at first, hesitated with the intention of headbutting me!
1504100041.korean: 얼버무릴 생각 말거라!&n처음에 박치기 할 속셈으로 멈칫한 걸 다 보았느니라!

1504100042.english: Couldn't you at least show some dignity as a saint when fighting?
1504100042.korean: 적어도 싸울 때만큼은 성녀로서 품위를 보여주면 안 되겠느냐?

1504100043.english: Sister Glacias, just as planned, we cut off their retreat and eliminated all the troops in the rear.
1504100043.korean: 글라시아스 누님, 작전대로 놈들의 퇴로를 차단하고 후방에 있던 병력을 전부 처치했수다.

1504100044.english: And... I thought it was noisy for some reason, and sure enough, it's those two.
1504100044.korean: 그리고... 왠지 시끄럽다 했는데 역시 저 두 사람이구먼.

1504100046.english: Haha, doesn't that mean we're close enough to fight?
1504100046.korean: 후후, 싸울 정도로 사이가 좋다는 뜻이 아니겠느냐.

1504100047.english: Looking at those two keeps bringing back old memories.
1504100047.korean: 저 두 사람을 보고 있으면 옛 생각이 계속 나는구나.

1504100048.english: Hmm... well, if my sister says so, then I guess that's how it is.
1504100048.korean: 흠… 뭐, 누님이 그렇다면 그런 거겠지.

1504100049.english: By the way... aren't you worried about your older sister?

1504100051.english: I mean that damn immature little brother of my older sister's.
1504100051.korean: 누님의 그 망할 철부지 동생 녀석 말이요.

1504100052.english: I simply cannot understand where you have been and what you have been doing all this time, and why you suddenly appear now to try and fight us.
1504100052.korean: 지금까지 어디서 뭘 하다가 이제 와서 갑자기 나타나, 우리와 싸우려고 하는지 나는 도무지 이해가 안가겠수다.

1504100053.english: My old friend... The Dragon Slayer must have delivered the final blow, so I don't know how he's still alive.
1504100053.korean: 애초에 옛 친구… 용살자가 분명 마지막 일격을 가했을 텐데 어떻게 살아있는지도 모르겠고.

1504100055.english: Yes… I, too, collapsed after watching Maeng-u pierce that child’s heart for the last time…
1504100055.korean: 그래… 나 역시 맹우가 그 아이의 심장을 꿰뚫는 모습을 마지막으로 지켜보고 쓰러졌었지…

1504100056.english: Honestly, I'm not sure what I should say if I meet that child again.
1504100056.korean: 그 아이를 다시 만난다면 어떤 말을 해야할지 솔직히 잘 모르겠구나.

1504200001.english: Thank you for coming to our aid, Laviata. Thanks to you, we were able to stop the Deathstalker without any major damage.
1504200001.korean: 지원을 와주셔서 감사합니다. 라비아타 님.&n덕분에 큰 피해 없이 데스스토커를 막을 수 있었습니다.

1504200002.english: I just did what was natural. Since we can't contact the Master right now, there is a very high possibility that Orca's main bases will be attacked.
1504200002.korean: 당연한 일을 했을 뿐인걸요.&n주인님과 연락이 되지 않는 지금, 오르카의 주요 거점을 공격당할 가능성이 매우 높으니까요.

1504200003.english: I came with the Bismarcks from the same background and the Horde unit to face Nidhogg.
1504200003.korean: 니드호그를 상대하기 위에 같은 출신의 비스마르크 분들 그리고 호드 부대와 함께 왔어요.

1504200004.english: The Horde are probably transporting supplies brought from Europe by now.
1504200004.korean: 호드 분들은 지금쯤 유럽에서 가져온 물자를 옮기고 있을 거예요.

1504200005.english: Actually, I wanted to bring more troops, but I decided that I couldn't afford to leave the defenses of Europe lax, just in case. This is the limit for now. I feel a bit sorry...
1504200005.korean: 사실 더 많은 병력을 데리고 오고 싶었지만, 혹시 모를 일을 대비해 유럽의 수비를 허술히 할 수는 없다고 판단했어요. 지금은 이 정도가 한계에요. 뭔가 미안하네요…

1504200006.english: No, not at all. I am grateful just for you coming to support us.
1504200006.korean: 아뇨, 무슨 말씀입니까.&n이렇게 지원을 와주신 것만으로도 감사합니다.

1504200007.english: There are already a large number of defensive troops remaining in Caracas, so now that Lady Laviata and the reinforcements have arrived, the enemy will not be able to attack easily.
1504200007.korean: 카라카스에는 이미 다수의 수비 병력이 남아 있으니, 라비아타 님과 지원 병력이 도착한 지금 적들도 이제 쉽게 공격하지 못할 겁니다.

1504200009.english: Has there been any new movement from Nidhogg since then?
1504200009.korean: 그 이후로 니드호그의 새로운 움직임이 있었나요?

1504200010.english: No, he hasn't shown up even once since then.
1504200010.korean: 아뇨, 그때 이후로 한 번도 모습을 드러내지 않고 있습니다.

1504200011.english: It seems they are continuing to look around Caracas using the AGS and plotting something, but so far there has been no special activity.
1504200011.korean: AGS를 이용해 계속 카라카스 주변을 둘러보며 무언가 꾸미고는 있는 것 같습니다만, 지금까지는 특별한 움직임이 없는 상태입니다.

1504200012.english: Could they be assessing the area around Caracas… perhaps even our military strength?
1504200012.korean: 카라카스의 주변을… 우리의 전력이라도 파악하고 있는 걸까요?

1504200013.english: That might be the case. At first, I assumed it was a diversionary tactic and checked other places, but there were no significant traces.
1504200013.korean: 그럴지도 모르겠군요.&n처음에는 양동작전이라 판단해 다른 곳도 확인해 봤지만 별다른 흔적은 없었습니다.

1504200014.english: There have been a few small skirmishes, but they were merely wars of nerves; we have never had a major engagement like today.
1504200014.korean: 몇 번인가 작은 교전이 있었지만 서로 신경전만 조금 벌였을 뿐, 오늘과 같이 큰 교전을 한 적은 없어.

1504200015.english: Buddy, I'm back. I'm on my way back from a quick look around Caracas with some new friends.
1504200015.korean: 버디, 돌아왔어.&n새로운 친구들과 간단하게 카라카스를 둘러보고 오는 길이야.

1504200016.english: By the way, Bismarck's friends who came along are really amazing.
1504200016.korean: 그나저나 함께 온 비스마르크 친구들 정말 대단한데?

1504200017.english: I knew Bismarck pursued extreme realism, but I didn't know he would be this strong.
1504200017.korean: 비스마르크가 극한의 리얼함을 추구하는 건 알고 있었지만, 이 정도로 강할 줄을 몰랐어.

1504200018.english: I swear, I thought I was watching a work of art right in front of my eyes in real time.
1504200018.korean: 진짜 눈 앞에서 하나의 작품을 실시간으로 보는 줄 알았다니깐?

1504200020.english: Lady Labiata, I heard that the Commander has headed to the northern front...
1504200020.korean: 라비아타 님, 들리는 이야기로는 사령관이 북부 전선으로 향했다고 들었습니다만…

1504200021.english: Yes, that is correct. The Master is currently on the northern front. We are currently unable to contact him due to some issues, though.
1504200021.korean: 네, 맞아요. 주인님은 지금 북부 전선에 계셔요.&n지금은 조금 문제가 있어 연락이 안 되는 상태이지만요.

1504200022.english: Ah, you don't need to worry. Your safety has been confirmed. I think you will resolve the issue soon and contact me.
1504200022.korean: 아, 걱정하지 않으셔도 돼요.&n주인님의 안전은 확인됐으니까요. 조만간 문제를 해결하시고 연락을 주실 거라 생각해요.

1504200023.english: In that case, that is a relief.

1504200024.english: Ha, you didn't even listen when I told you several times that I'd be fine, but you make that face the moment you confirmed I'm safe?
1504200024.korean: 하, 내가 괜찮을 거라고 몇 번이나 말할 때는 들은채도 안하더니, 무사하다는 게 확인되자마자 그런 표정을 짓는 거야?

1504200025.english: To think that even though I have a buddy named Nara, my heart is far away somewhere else… This is so sad.
1504200025.korean: 나라는 버디가 있음에도 마음은 저 멀리 다른 곳에 있다니… 이거 너무 슬픈데?

1504200026.english: President, do you know? A proposal for a new facility recently passed the City Guard review.
1504200026.korean: 통령, 그거 알아?&n얼마 전에 새로운 시설의 기획안이 시티 가드 심의를 통과했거든?

1504200027.english: But this guy, when that facility is completed, together with the commander...
1504200027.korean: 그런데 이 녀석 그 시설이 완공되거든 사령관이랑 같이…

1504200028.english: I’ll violate you right now, Sonia.
1504200028.korean: 지금 당장 널 유린시켜 주마 소니아.

1504200029.english: Haha… Buddy? It feels like the Taser Cannon is running at maximum power right now. Is it just my imagination?
1504200029.korean: 하하… 버디? 지금 테이저 캐논이 최대 출력으로 작동하고 있는 것 같은데 내 기분 탓이지?

1504200032.english: Yeah, this guy will forgive you.
1504200032.korean: 그래, 이 녀석은 널 용서할 거야.

1504200033.english: But there's no way I'll forgive you!
1504200033.korean: 하지만 내가 널 용서할 리가 없잖아!

1504200038.english: Wouldn't it be better for you to just stay on the transport ship? There is no need to go to such lengths...
1504200038.korean: 그냥 수송선에 계시는 게 좋지 않을까요?&n이렇게까지 무리하실 필요는…

1504200039.english: But... it's Caracas... where I've finally returned...

1504200040.english: As the administrator who used to manage Caracas... *pant pant*... hearing that this place is in crisis... I can't just sit idly by...
1504200040.korean: 기존에… 헥헥... 카라카스를 관리하던 관리자로서… 이곳이 위기에 처했다는 말을 듣고… 가만히 있을 수는 없어요…

1504200041.english: It would be nice if we could use a transport plane, but it isn't a completely safe area yet.
1504200041.korean: 수송기라도 사용할 수 있으면 좋겠지만, 아직 완전히 안전한 지역은 아니니까요.

1504200042.english: I totally relate to that. It would have been so much easier if we could have used transport planes…
1504200042.korean: 그거 완전 공감이야.&n수송기를 사용할 수 있었으면 편했을 텐데…

1504200044.english: What's wrong? Why are you looking at me like that?
1504200044.korean: 왜 그래?&n왜 그런 눈으로 나를 보는 거야?

1504200046.english: Why do you think I am? I’m saying that’s not something you should be saying.
1504200046.korean: 왜긴 왜겠어? 네가 할 소리는 아니라는 거잖아.

1504200047.english: You should walk on your own two legs sometimes. Look at that hyena; it was so excited that it broke away from the formation and ran all the way over there.
1504200047.korean: 너도 가끔은 좀 두 다리로 직접 걸으라고.&n하이에나를 좀 봐, 너무 신난 나머지 대형을 이탈해서 저 멀리까지 가버렸잖아.

1504200048.english: Isn't it too difficult to imitate a hyena?
1504200048.korean: 하이에나를 따라 하기에는 너무 난이도가 높지 않아?

1504200049.english: But where on earth did he go? I can't see him anymore.
1504200049.korean: 그런데 쟤는 대체 어디까지 간 거야?&n이젠 시야에서 안 보이는데?

1504200050.english: Haa... I'll go pick you up.

1504200052.english: But what are these things we are moving right now? It is a considerable amount, though.
1504200052.korean: 그런데 우리가 지금 옮기고 있는 이것들은 뭐야? 상당한 양이긴 한데.

1504200055.english: I'm such a fool for asking you guys...

1504200057.english: President Laviata said that she heard it was a new medicine developed by the doctor.
1504200057.korean: 라비아타 통령의 말로는 닥터가 새로 개발한 약이라고 들었다.

1504200058.english: Medicine... would we have any use for it?

1504200059.english: They said it is absolutely necessary for this operation, so it will probably be used soon.
1504200059.korean: 이번 작전에서 꼭 필요하다고 했으니 아마도 조만간 사용하게 될 거다.

1504200060.english: … There won't be any side effects, right?

1504200061.english: I heard that your body temperature may rise slightly and you may become excited while the effect lasts.
1504200061.korean: 듣기로는 효과가 지속되는 동안 살짝 체온이 높아지고 흥분 상태가 될 수 있다고는 들었다.

1504200065.english: That's strange. I'm sure I heard someone calling.
1504200065.korean: 이상하다, 분명 누군가 부르는 소리가 들렸던 것 같은데?

1504200067.english: So, what's the surroundings like? Do you see anything strange?
1504200067.korean: 그래서 주변은 어때? 이상한 게 보이거나 하진 않아?

1504200068.english: Nothing. It's clean. At this rate, we should be able to arrive in Caracas without any problems.
1504200068.korean: 아무것도요. 깨끗해요.&n이대로라면 별일 없이 카라카스에 도착할 수 있을 거예요.

1504200069.english: Then let's hurry. I think it would be best to arrive before sunset.
1504200069.korean: 그럼 서두르지.&n해가 지기 전까지는 도착하는 게 좋을 것 같다.

1504200070.english: ...they say that, are you sure it'll be okay?

1504200073.english: Captain Khan was so cool again today. I also got some good information.
1504200073.korean: 칸 대장님은 오늘도 너무 멋졌어.&n좋은 정보도 얻었고.

1504200074.english: A new drug... If Captain Khan takes that... just in case... Uhuhu...
1504200074.korean: 새로운 신약이라… 그걸 칸 대장님이 먹으면… 혹시라도... 우흐흐…

1504200076.english: … What is that? I think I saw something shining over there?

1504200077.english: Shall I just check for a moment?

1504200078.english: Huh? That's strange. There's nothing here?

1504200079.english: I'm pretty sure something huge shone around here...
1504200079.korean: 분명 여기쯤에서 거대한 뭔가가 빛난 것 같았는데…

1504200080.english: There is nothing around that looks like it would shine...
1504200080.korean: 주변에 뭔가 빛날만한 건 아무것도 없고…

1504200082.english: Hmm... it looked quite big at first glance, but since there's nothing there... I must have seen it wrong, right?
1504200082.korean: 흠… 언뜻 봤을 때 상당히 커 보였는데 아무 것도 없으니까… 내가 잘못 본 게 맞겠지?

1504300001.english: How long on earth are you going to keep hiding in such a gloomy place?
1504300001.korean: 대체 언제까지 이런 음침한 곳에 숨어 있을 거죠?

1504300003.english: Are you making me run errands while you just leisurely sleep?
1504300003.korean: 저한테는 심부름을 시키고 당신은 태평하게 잠이나 자는 건가요?

1504300006.english: I finished everything. I installed everything at the location you specified.
1504300006.korean: 전부 끝냈어요.&n당신이 지정한 위치에 전부 설치했죠.

1504300007.english: When I heard it was Omega's new toy, I thought it was just a waste of time, but as you said, it turned out to be more useful than I expected.
1504300007.korean: 오메가의 새로운 장난감이라길래 무슨 헛짓거리인가 싶었는데, 당신 말대로 생각보다 쓸만하더군요.

1504300008.english: I've only heard about these things. Where on earth did Omega find them?
1504300008.korean: 말로만 듣던 것들인데 오메가는 대체 어디서 이것들을 발견한 거죠?

1504300010.english: The important thing is that we are ready to welcome them.
1504300010.korean: 중요한 건 우리가 녀석들을 맞이할 준비가 되었다는 거지.

1504300012.english: Reinforcements arrived in Caracas today. The blind saint you mentioned was also there.
1504300012.korean: 오늘 카라카스에 지원군이 도착했더군요.&n당신이 말했던 그 눈먼 성녀의 모습도 있었죠.

1504300013.english: Hahaha... As expected, you're here. Yeah, I suppose you had no choice but to come.
1504300013.korean: 크크크크… 역시 왔나.&n그래 올 수밖에 없겠지.

1504300014.english: Then there is no need to wait any longer. Tonight is the day my revenge will be realized.
1504300014.korean: 그렇다면 더는 기다릴 필요가 없겠군.&n오늘 밤이야말로 나의 복수가 실현되는 날이다.

1504300016.english: Hmph, I wonder what's making them so excited...

1504300017.english: No, it’s not that I don’t understand at all.
1504300017.korean: 아니, 전혀 이해가 안 되는 건 아니군요.

1504300018.english: I didn't expect to see you again this soon...
1504300018.korean: 이렇게 빨리 다시 보게 될 줄은 몰랐는데…

1504300019.english: Did you want to see me too?

1504300021.english: So what? How on earth did it end up like this?
1504300021.korean: 그래서? 대체 어쩌다 이렇게 된 거지?

1504300022.english: I wish someone would explain this to me.

1504300023.english: Alright! Let's see if we succeed this time, shall we?
1504300023.korean: 좋아! 과연 이번에도 성공할지 한 번 볼까?

1504300025.english: I will show you the power of the one called the Saint of Light.
1504300025.korean: 빛의 성녀라 불리는 저의 힘을 보여드리겠습니다.

1504300029.english: You actually did it, right? You chugged that huge amount in a single sitting?
1504300029.korean: 정말로 해냈잖아? 저 많은 양을 단 한 번에 원샷을 했다고?

1504300031.english: I have no choice but to admit this! Alright! From today, we are friends! And very special best friends at that!
1504300031.korean: 이거 인정할 수밖에 없겠는데!&n좋아! 오늘부터 우리는 친구다! 그것도 아주 특별한 베프지!

1504300032.english: Great! Then, to celebrate becoming best friends, shall we go all out tonight?
1504300032.korean: 좋아요! 그럼 베프가 된 기념으로 오늘 밤은 끝까지 달려볼까요!

1504300034.english: How… how on earth… As expected, she is disqualified as a saint!
1504300034.korean: 어떻게… 대체 어떻게… 역시 성녀 실격이니라!

1504300035.english: Ahaha... I'm sorry. Somehow, those three ended up hitting it off... I guess there's something about them that clicks.
1504300035.korean: 아하하… 죄송해요.&n어쩌다 보니 저 세 사람이 의기투합하게 돼서… 뭔가 서로 맞는 게 있나 봐요.

1504300036.english: But it's okay. Because what I'm drinking right now is non-alcoholic.
1504300036.korean: 하지만 괜찮아요.&n지금 마시고 있는 건 무알코올이니까요.

1504300037.english: Even so, we don't drink alcohol during operations. Everyone is just caught up in the atmosphere.
1504300037.korean: 아무리 그래도 작전 중에 술을 마시지는 않아요.&n다들 분위기에 취해 있을 뿐이에요.

1504300039.english: It's a good thing that child didn't follow; I wonder what they would think seeing that...
1504300039.korean: 그 아이가 따라오지 않아서 망정이지, 저런 모습을 보고 무슨 생각을 할지…

1504300040.english: Oh? That voice over there is me, little one. Welcome.
1504300040.korean: 오? 거기서 들리는 목소리는 작은 저로군요, 어서 와요.

1504300041.english: How about you? If you drink the contents of this glass in one gulp, you can become best friends with these people.
1504300041.korean: 당신도 어떠세요? 이 잔에 담긴 걸 단번에 들이키면 이분들과 베프가 될 수 있어요.

1504300042.english: It seems you don't know, so let me tell you. We don't call things that look like that a cup.
1504300042.korean: 잘 모르는 것 같으니 알려주마.&n우리는 그렇게 생긴 걸 잔이라고 부르지 않는다.

1504300043.english: It looks like you're really drunk.

1504300044.english: Hey, come on~ This isn't even that drunk. I can still drink more.
1504300044.korean: 에이~ 이 정도는 취한 것도 아닌걸요.&n아직 더 마실 수 있답니다.

1504300045.english: Oh? If you're not drunk, you should be able to block this too, right?
1504300045.korean: 호오? 취한 게 아니라면 이것도 막을 수 있겠지?

1504300046.english: Demonic Sword: The Covenant of Darkness!

1504300048.english: Ooh! What? You grabbed the sword that suddenly appeared with both hands? That's amazing!
1504300048.korean: 오오! 뭐야? 갑자기 나타난 검을 양손으로 잡았잖아? 굉장한데!

1504300049.english: Hehe, how is it? I'm telling you, I'm not drunk.

1504300051.english: What on earth is all this commotion about?

1504300052.english: Ahaha... There was a little commotion.

1504300054.english: What are you looking at so intently?

1504300055.english: Huh? No, it's because that Jinjo Princess just drew her sword and made it disappear...
1504300055.korean: 응? 아니, 방금 저 진조의 공주님이 검을 꺼냈다가 사라지게 한 거 때문에…

1504300056.english: Ah, I was a little surprised when I first saw it, too. It's Bismarck's hologram technology, you know?
1504300056.korean: 아~ 저도 처음에 봤을 때는 살짝 놀랐어요.&n비스마르크 사의 홀로그램 기술이라는 거잖아요?

1504300057.english: It's a hologram, so I'm not exactly sure how it delivers a physical shock. Don't you know better than anyone, Mr. Talonfeather?
1504300057.korean: 홀로그램인데 대체 어떻게 물리적 충격을 주는 건지는 잘 모르겠지만요.&n탈론페더 씨가 더 잘 알고 계시지 않나요?

1504300061.english: What? Where are you suddenly going at this hour of the night? Oh, they're gone...
1504300061.korean: 네? 이 밤 중에 갑자기 어디를요?&n앗, 가버렸다…

1504300063.english: Ah, Captain Khan, thank you for your hard work. There is nothing special to report.
1504300063.korean: 아, 칸 대장님 수고하셨어요.&n별다른 일은 없어요.

1504300064.english: saw Talonfeather heading somewhere in a hurry. Do you know anything about it?
1504300064.korean: 탈론페더가 급하게 어디로 향하는 모습이 보였는데, 아는 게 있나?

1504300065.english: I don't really know either. He seemed to be deep in thought about something, then suddenly left...
1504300065.korean: 저도 잘 모르겠어요.&n뭔가를 고심이 생각하더니 갑자기 가버려서…

1504300070.english: I hope I'm mistaken... but if my prediction is correct...

1504300072.english: This iron texture, it's definitely it... I can't see it, but something huge is lying right in front of me.
1504300072.korean: 이 철의 감촉, 틀림없어… 눈에 보이지 않지만, 이 앞에 거대한 뭔가가 놓여 있어.

1504300073.english: Is it hidden so it's not visible using hologram technology?
1504300073.korean: 홀로그램 기술로 안 보이게 감춰둔 건가?

1504300074.english: What should I do? Should I try attacking first... but I don't even know exactly what this is, and making a loud noise might be dangerous...
1504300074.korean: 어떡하지, 일단 공격해 볼까… 하지만 이게 정확히 뭔지도 모르고 큰 소리를 내면 위험할 수도…

1504300076.english: Ah, AGS, when did that happen!?

1504300079.english: Captain Khan? Huh!? I'm being held by you right now... Ah, no! Yes, I'm fine!
1504300079.korean: 칸 대장님? 앗!? 나 지금 대장님에게 안겨 있…&n아, 아니지! 네, 전 괜찮아요!

1504300080.english: How did the Captain get here?

1504300081.english: followed you because I was worried after seeing you heading somewhere alone.
1504300081.korean: 네가 혼자 어디론가 향하는 모습을 보았기에 걱정되어서 따라왔다.

1504300082.english: There is much to say, including about independent action, but the sermon will come later.
1504300082.korean: 단독행동을 포함해서 할 얘기는 많지만 설교는 나중이다.

1504300083.english: Deal with the AGS approaching nearby. Can you do it?
1504300083.korean: 주변에 접근 중인 AGS를 처리한다.&n할 수 있겠나?

1504400003.english: The one I just knocked down is the last one.

1504400005.english: Why did you come here alone? You must know how dangerous it is to act alone.
1504400005.korean: 왜 이곳에 혼자 온 거지?&n단독 행동이 얼마나 위험한지 알고 있을 텐데?

1504400006.english: I'm sorry... I was in a hurry to check it...

1504400008.english: Yes, at that location, there is something invisible hidden by a hologram...
1504400008.korean: 네, 저 위치에 홀로그램으로 감춰진 보이지 않는 무언가가...

1504400009.english: Huh? It suddenly started shining? Oh, the hologram turned off.

1504400011.english: A huge machine… it looks just like a kiln, but what is it? There is something that looks like a bottle containing a green liquid attached to the top.
1504400011.korean: 거대한 기계 장치… 마치 가마처럼 보이는데 뭘까요?&n위에 뭔가 초록색 액체가 든 병 같은 게 달려 있는데.

1504400012.english: Huh? It suddenly started working! Green smoke is coming out...

1504400013.english: … !! Feder, step back! You must absolutely not inhale that smoke!!
1504400013.korean: …!! 페더, 물러서라!&n절대 그 연기를 마시면 안 된다!!

1504400015.english: There is no doubt about it. This smoke is poison!

1504400016.english: Poison, poison!? What should I do?

1504400018.english: Ah, Captain, watch out! There's an enemy from behind!

1504400020.english: Are you okay? I can't see well because of the smoke. Is this an AGS?
1504400020.korean: 괜찮으세요?&n연기 때문에 잘 안 보이는데 AGS 인가요?

1504400024.english: ...Feather hurriedly leaves this place and returns to the base.

1504400025.english: Caracas will soon become a battlefield.
1504400025.korean: 카라카스는 이제 곧, 전장이 될 거다.

1504500002.english: If I had a little more time, I could have made it perfect... but given the circumstances, I have adopted a method to increase resistance for now, based on the research results so far.
1504500002.korean: 시간이 좀 더 있었더라면 완벽하게 만들어냈겠지만… 상황이 이렇다 보니 지금까지 연구된 결과를 바탕으로 당장엔 저항력을 높이는 방식을 채택해 봤어.

1504500003.english: Since it was made in a hurry, depending on the user, it may cause body temperature to rise or lead to a state of excitement, but we plan to improve it gradually...
1504500003.korean: 급하게 만들어서 사용자에 따라서는 체온이 높아지거나 흥분 상태에 빠질 수도 있지만 차차 개선하기로 하고…

1504500004.english: Anyway, if you drink this medicine, you will be able to temporarily resist Nidhogg's poison.
1504500004.korean: 아무튼 이 약을 마시면 니드호그의 독으로부터 일시적으로 저항할 수 있을 거야.

1504500005.english: However, the effects of the medicine are not permanent.

1504500006.english: The effect of the medicine lasts for 4 to 5 hours. After this time, the effect drops rapidly.
1504500006.korean: 약의 지속시간은 4~5시간.&n이 이상 시간이 지나면 약의 효과가 급격히 떨어져.

1504500007.english: No matter how much you boost your resistance, medicine is only a temporary measure and cannot defend against a large amount of poison being injected directly into your body, so please keep this in mind.
1504500007.korean: 아무리 저항력을 높였다고 해도 약은 임시방편일 뿐, 몸에 직접 많은 독을 주입 당하는 건 방어할 수 없으니까 이 점을 주의해 줘.

1504500008.english: This is all I can do for you…
1504500008.korean: 내가 해줄 수 있는 건 여기까지야…

1504500009.english: You must come back safely, Laviata.
1504500009.korean: 꼭 무사히 돌아와야 해, 라비아타 언니.

1504500011.english: Hehe, I should thank the Doctor. I'll make sure to get back safely.

1504500012.english: Ms. Laviata, as you requested, we have distributed the medicine you brought to all members of the Orca and residents of Caracas.
1504500012.korean: 라비아타 님.&n말씀하신 대로 가져오신 약을 오르카 대원 및 카라카스 주민 전원에게 배분했습니다.

1504500013.english: Thank you for your hard work. I can rest assured for now.

1504500014.english: I ask the City Guard members to ensure the residents are prepared in the event of an emergency, as discussed.
1504500014.korean: 시티 가드 대원분들에게는 사태가 발생했을 경우, 논의한 대로 주민들의 대비를 부탁드릴게요.

1504500016.english: If Nidhogg's goal is really provocation... there will definitely be a move soon.
1504500016.korean: 니드호그의 목적이 정말로 도발이라면… 분명 조만간 움직임이 있을 거예요.

1504500017.english: It looks like that movement just happened!!
1504500017.korean: 그 움직임이 바로 지금 일어난 모양이야!!

1504500019.english: Buddy, and the President. There's something we need to check on the outskirts!
1504500019.korean: 버디, 그리고 통령. 외곽 쪽에 봐야할 게 있어!

1504500020.english: This is…! Green smoke coming from the outskirts of the city…!

1504500021.english: … !! It's poison! Everyone, please use the medicine immediately!

1504500022.english: I already used it. It looks like Buddy just used it too.
1504500022.korean: 난 이미 사용했어.&n버디도 지금 사용한 모양이고.

1504500024.english: I don't know the exact details, but according to reports, a large number of massive, furnace-like mechanical devices suddenly appeared around the forests on the outskirts of Caracas.
1504500024.korean: 정확한 건 모르겠지만, 보고에 따르면 카라카스 외곽 숲 주변에서 갑자기 거대한 가마 같은 기계 장치가 다수 나타났다고 해.

1504500025.english: This smoke is coming out of that device.
1504500025.korean: 이 연기는 그 장치에서 나오는 거고.

1504500026.english: Appeared suddenly? We couldn't find anything like that at all during patrols just this afternoon.
1504500026.korean: 갑자기 나타났다고? 오늘 낮까지만 해도 순찰 중에 그런 건 전혀 찾아볼 수 없었는데?

1504500029.english: They have used Bismarck's holographic technology to keep the machine concealed until now. I am on my way back after verifying it myself.
1504500029.korean: 비스마르크의 홀로그램 기술을 사용해 기계 장치를 지금까지 은폐 시켜놓은 거다.&n내가 직접 확인하고 오는 길이다.

1504500030.english: They must have spent time secretly installing it and kept it hidden until now.
1504500030.korean: 시간을 들여 몰래 설치한 후 지금까지 은폐 시켜놨던 거겠지.

1504500031.english: Talonfeather is currently assessing the situation, but it appears there is more than one device generating poisonous fog.
1504500031.korean: 탈론페더가 지금 파악 중이다만, 독 안개를 발생시키는 장치는 한 둘이 아닌 모양이다.

1504500032.english: At this rate, the entire city of Caracas will be filled with poisonous fog in less than an hour.
1504500032.korean: 이대로라면 한 시간도 지나지 않아서 카라카스 전체가 독 안개로 가득 찰 거다.

1504500033.english: Mr. Thaddeus, issue the alert and evacuate the residents…!
1504500033.korean: 사디어스 씨, 경보 발령과 주민의 대피를…!

1504500036.english: Good! Both of you watch out!

1504500037.english: Captain Khan, I would like to ask you to destroy the machine generating the poisonous mist along with the Horde members.
1504500037.korean: 칸 대장은 호드 대원들과 함께 독 안개를 발생시키는 기계 장치의 파괴를 부탁드릴게요.

1504500038.english: Understood. Leave the destruction of the furnace to our Horde.
1504500038.korean: 알겠다. 가마의 파괴는 우리 호드에게 맡겨라.

1504500039.english: And President, I have a report. New bioroid forces have been deployed against them.
1504500039.korean: 그리고 통령, 보고할게 있다.&n이번에 놈들에게 새로운 바이오로이드 병력이 투입됐다.

1504500040.english: new bioroid? What kind of individual is it?

1504500041.english: I haven't seen it myself so I'm not entirely sure, but... based on the data, it is definitely true.
1504500041.korean: 나도 지금까지 직접 본 적이 없어 확실하지 않지만… 데이터로 확인했을 때 틀림없다.

1504500042.english: That bioroid is… 'T-1 Goblin', Black River's first bioroid.
1504500042.korean: 그 바이오로이드는… 'T-1 고블린' 블랙 리버 최초의 바이오로이드다.

1504500043.english: It was noisy outside, so I came out to see what the commotion was about...
1504500043.korean: 바깥이 시끄러워 무슨 소란인가 하여 나와봤더니…

1504500044.english: I didn't know we would meet this soon.
1504500044.korean: 이렇게 빨리 마주하게 될 줄은 몰랐구나.

1504500045.english: This feeling… it’s been a really long time.

1504500046.english: I can't see, but I can feel it. It seems you harbored a lot of feelings for me.
1504500046.korean: 앞이 보이지 않지만 느껴져요.&n아무래도 저에게 품은 감정이 많았던 모양이군요.

1504500047.english: Even if you hide in the darkness, you cannot deceive me! Now, reveal yourself!
1504500047.korean: 어둠 속에 숨어도 짐의 사안을 속일 수는 없느니라!&n이제 그만 모습을 드러내거라!

1504500049.english: Hahaha... I have no idea how long I've been waiting for this day.

1504500050.english: I never imagined that not only the blind saint but also the little princess would be there.
1504500050.korean: 눈먼 성녀 뿐만 아니라 작은 공주까지 같이 있을 줄이야.

1504500051.english: But I can't see my sister or that noisy birdbrain. Where are they?
1504500051.korean: 그런데 내 누이와 시끄러운 새대가리의 모습이 보이지 않는 데, 어디 있지?

1504500052.english: Where else but your head! Big Sister! Just do it!
1504500052.korean: 어디에 있긴, 네 머리 위에 있지!&n누님! 해버리셔요!

1504500056.english: Hmph, do you think you can stop me with just this much ice?
1504500056.korean: 흥, 고작 이 정도 얼음으로 나를 막을 수 있다고 생각하나?

1504500057.english: Of course I don't think that way at all, since I know exactly what kind of guy you are. But at least you can respond before you take your next move, right?
1504500057.korean: 당연히 전혀 그렇게 생각 안 하지, 네가 어떤 놈인지 잘 알고 있으니까.&n하지만 적어도 다음 행동을 하기 전까지 대응은 할 수 있지 않겠어?

1504500058.english: You're still as noisy as ever, you birdbrain. Anyway…

1504500061.english: That voice just now... could it be Glacias?

1504500062.english: ...It's been a long time, Nidhogg, my little brother who has fallen into depravity, addicted to pleasure.
1504500062.korean: ...오랜만이구나 니드호그, 쾌락에 중독되어 타락한 내 동생아.

1504500064.english: Hmm... that indescribable emotion, even though it is my enemy, I understand. It must be truly difficult to describe the feelings of seeing your sister change like that after such a long time.
1504500064.korean: 음... 그 말로 표현할 수 없는 감정, 적이지만 이해해.&n오랜만의 본 누이의 모습이 저렇게 변했을 경우의 감정을 서술하기란 참 어렵겠지.

1504500065.english: Nidhogg, the old stories given to us have all come to an end. There is no longer any reason to be trapped by the past, which was enforced by a contract.
1504500065.korean: 니드호그, 우리에게 주어진 옛이야기는 모두 끝났단다.&n이제 계약으로 강제되었던 과거의 모습에 사로잡힐 이유는 어디에도 없다.

1504500066.english: Don't you know that well yourself?

1504500068.english: Is that the first thing you say to a younger sibling you haven't seen in a long time? It seems that appearance isn't the only thing that has changed, Big Sister.
1504500068.korean: 그게 오랜만에 만난 동생에게 하는 첫 소리인가?&n변한 것은 그 모습 뿐만이 아닌가 보군, 누님.

1504500069.english: The old you wouldn't have even had a conversation like this.
1504500069.korean: 예전의 너라면 이런 대화는 하지도 않았을 텐데.

1504500070.english: You say there is no reason to be captivated by the past? Of course not. I, too, have no intention of staying entangled in stories created by humans.
1504500070.korean: 과거의 모습에 사로잡힐 이유가 없다고?&n물론이지, 나 역시 인간들이 만들어 낸 이야기 따위에 계속 얽혀 있을 생각은 없다.

1504500072.english: That is why... because I am a free body, unbound! Right now, I simply act as desire and pleasure lead me.
1504500072.korean: 그렇기에... 얽혀있지 않은 자유로운 몸이기 때문에!&n지금의 나는 욕망과 쾌락이 이끄는 대로 행동할 뿐이다.

1504500073.english: And my greatest desire is to take revenge on you guys who defeated me.
1504500073.korean: 그리고 나의 최대 욕망은 나를 쓰러트렸던 너희들에게 복수하는 것이지.

1504500074.english: To me, this desire and pleasure cannot be rejected, nor is there any reason to reject them. This is the pleasure I purely desire, nothing more and nothing less.
1504500074.korean: 나에게 있어 이 욕망과 쾌락은 거부할 수도 거부할 이유도 없다.&n이건 내가 순수하게 원하는 쾌락, 그 이상 그 이하도 아니다.

1504500076.english: Give up, older sister! She's not someone you can reason with in the first place!
1504500076.korean: 누님 포기하쇼, 애초에 말이 통하는 상대가 아니잖수!

1504500077.english: You know very well, Sister, that guy was created to be our enemy from the very beginning!
1504500077.korean: 놈은 처음부터 우리와 적대하기 위해서 만들어졌다는 걸 누님도 잘 알잖수!

1504500079.english: That stupid birdbrain is right. If it could have been resolved through dialogue, we wouldn't have reached this point.
1504500079.korean: 멍청한 새대가리의 말이 맞다.&n대화로 해결될 일이었다면 지금의 상황까지 오지 않았겠지.

1504500080.english: I can feel the poisonous fog getting worse. We need to deal with this before it completely engulfs Caracas.
1504500080.korean: 독 안개가 점점 심해지고 있는 게 느껴져요.&n완전히 카라카스를 뒤덮기 전에 해결해야 합니다.

1504500081.english: Oh? It looks like you've come up with a countermeasure against my poison. But you won't be able to hold out forever.
1504500081.korean: 호오? 아무래도 내 독에 대한 대책을 세웠나 보군.&n하지만 계속 버틸 수는 없겠지.

1504500082.english: You are the ones who fell to me back then, even with the Dragon Slayer present. Now that the Dragon Slayer is gone, can you defeat me on your own?
1504500082.korean: 그때는 용살자가 있었음에도 나에게 쓰러졌던 너희들이다.&n용살자가 없는 지금, 너희들 만으로 나를 쓰러트릴 수 있을까?

1504500083.english: Of course! I am the Princess of the True Ancestors who has returned to the mortal world after overcoming death! And here are the Saintess who has awakened the power of light, along with the Allies of Destiny who once defeated you!
1504500083.korean: 물론이다! 짐은 죽음을 이겨내도 다시 현세에 왕림한 진조의 공주!&n그리고 한 때 너를 꺾었던 운명의 동조자들과 빛의 힘을 각성한 성녀인 짐이 있느니라!

1504500085.english: Just like Jim, there are followers of the familiar who have been reincarnated in the present world!
1504500085.korean: 짐과 마찬가지로 현세에 환생한 권속의 추종자들이 있다!

1504500086.english: Hmm, are they the Orca members...

1504500087.english: It might be overwhelming for me to take on all of these people by myself.
1504500087.korean: 확실히 나 혼자서 이 인원을 전부 상대하기에는 벅찰지도 모르겠군.

1504500088.english: W-what? Suddenly, lava-like heat emanated from his body!? He completely melted my sister's ice!? He shouldn't have had that kind of power.
